```js title=bar_js.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["bar_js"], {
"./bar.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (test)
});
function test() {}


},

}]);
```

```js title=main.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./a.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  a: () => (a)
});
__rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "bar_js").then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./bar.js")).then(mod => {
	console.log(mod);
});
const a = "a";

exports.test = 30;


},
"./foo.js"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
if (true) {
	const res = __rspack_require("./a.js");
	module.exports = res;
} else {}

// export default function () {}


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _foo__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./foo.js");
/* import */ var _foo__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_foo__rspack_import_0);


_foo__rspack_import_0_default()();


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
